channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PTI supports Afridi’s son over asylum, cites harassment by authorities
item.description: Islamabad – Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) on Thursday defended the decision of MNA Iqbal Afridi’s 28-year-old son to seek asylum in Italy, stating that he had no other choice to avoid detention and h...

item.title: Strengthening Cybersecurity and Online Privacy for Tanzania’s Digital Growth
item.description: Tanzania is quickly embracing the digital world, and this brings both opportunities and challenges. With more people using the internet and mobile technologies, the country faces growing risks from cy...

item.title: Investigation Launched into Nigel Farage's £1.635m Gift from British Crypto Entrepreneur
item.description: Nigel Farage, the former UKIP leader and prominent political figure, is reportedly under investigation following the receipt of a substantial financial gift of £1.635 million from a British cryptocurr...

item.title: Government proposes unified regulator and broader pollution controls in water industry overhaul
item.description: The UK government has announced proposals for a major overhaul of water regulation as part of the King’s Speech. The planned Water Reform Bill seeks to address ongoing issues such as rising water bill...

item.title: Comelec disqualifies 13 barangay and SK candidates for campaign violations
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has disqualified thirteen candidates in the barangay and Sangguniang Kabataan elections for violating campaign regulations during the October 2023 BSKE. Among tho...

item.title: Government Weighs NEET Exam Cancellation Amid Student Concerns
item.description: According to multiple sources, there has been ongoing debate regarding the cancellation of the NEET examination this year. The government is reportedly evaluating the financial implications of conduct...

item.title: U.S. sanctions on Cuba focus on military-run conglomerate GAESA amid economic tensions
item.description: The Trump administration has intensified sanctions against Cuba, specifically targeting the military-run conglomerate GAESA, which dominates the island's banking, retail, and tourism sectors. The U.S....

item.title: Yunusa Tanko Says Obidient Movement Wants 2027 Election Decided at Polling Units, Not in Court
item.description: Ahead of the 2027 general elections, the National Coordinator of the Obidient Movement, Yunusa Tanko, don talk say dem no wan give any chance for their matter to go court after the polls. Tanko, wey b...

item.title: US Sees Decline in Drug Overdose Deaths Despite Emerging Risks
item.description: Drug overdose fatalities in the United States fell to around 70,000 in 2025, marking a 14% reduction from the previous year and the third consecutive annual decline. This is the longest sustained decr...

item.title: The Life and Designs of Frederick Starke in Post-War British Fashion
item.description: Frederick Starke (1904–1988) was a highly influential British wholesale couturier whose work shaped post-war fashion in the United Kingdom. Born into a Jewish family with a strong tradition in the clo...

item.title: Five Pakistani Soldiers Martyred, Seven Militants Killed in Balochistan Operation
item.description: In Balochistan's Barkhan district, a major counter-terrorism operation was carried out on May 13, 2026, by Pakistan Army and Frontier Corps personnel, resulting in the elimination of seven India-backe...

item.title: Daily Pill May Help Maintain Weight Loss After Injectable Treatments
item.description: Recent studies suggest that transitioning from weight-loss injections to a daily oral medication may help individuals sustain weight loss over the long term. Weight-loss injections, such as those cont...

item.title: Rosie Holt turns Rachel Reeves' historic urinal dilemma into satirical play
item.description: When Rachel Reeves became the UK's first female chancellor of the exchequer, she encountered a peculiar barrier to change: a historic urinal in her office at No 11 Downing Street. Comedian and satiris...

item.title: WhatsApp Launches Incognito Chat Feature for Private Conversations with Meta AI
item.description: WhatsApp has introduced a new feature called Incognito Chat, designed to let users interact with Meta AI while maintaining strong privacy protections. The chats leverage WhatsApp's Private Processing ...

item.title: Trump's $10 Billion IRS Lawsuit May Be Settled by DOJ
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice is reportedly discussing the possibility of settling President Donald Trump's $10 billion lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service. The suit, filed in January 2026, ...

item.title: NBI Confidential Agent Apprehended Following Shooting Incident at Senate
item.description: Senator Imee Marcos reported that an alleged confidential agent of the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) was arrested following a shooting incident at the Senate on Wednesday evening. According t...

item.title: Rising cooking gas costs put strain on Tanzanian families amid high fuel prices
item.description: Households across Tanzania are feeling the pinch as cooking gas prices increase, influenced by rising global fuel costs. The price of a 6kg cylinder has jumped from Sh24,000 to Sh28,000, while a 15kg ...

item.title: Marcos Denies Administration Role in Senate Incident Involving Alleged Arrest Attempt on Sen. Dela Rosa
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. firmly denied any involvement of his administration in the chaos that erupted at the Philippine Senate, which was linked to an alleged attempt to arrest Senator Ronald '...

item.title: JWST Produces Most Detailed Map of the Cosmic Web Tracing Back to When the Universe Was 1 Billion Years Old
item.description: Astronomers using NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) have produced the highest-resolution map yet of the universe's cosmic web, the vast network of dark matter and gas filaments that connects ga...

item.title: The Psychological Benefits of Leaving a Party Quietly
item.description: Across cultures, there are terms for slipping out of a social gathering without saying goodbye, from the Irish goodbye to the French leave. While traditional etiquette may frown upon this behaviour, p...
